title: Outgoing product surface compressed into a match-cut handoff
description: A resolved product card clears its detail, compresses into a pill, and moves toward the next shot during the final seam window so a shape-match cut reads as caused.

params.name: eyebrow
params.description: Small context line above the result.

params.name: title
params.description: Resolved product outcome shown before the handoff.

params.name: body
params.description: One short supporting line inside the source surface.
params.default: Every reviewer signed off in the release thread.

params.name: handoffLabel
params.description: The compact label that survives into the outgoing pill.

params.name: bridgePart
params.description: Stable data-part used as the outgoing shape-match endpoint.

params.name: accent
params.description: Brand token for the status, seam line, and landed pill.

params.name: handoffSec
params.description: Seconds after scene start when the pill completes its seam move; place the cut 0.35–0.7s later.
